case_title: PAGE, PATRICIA L. VS JOHNSON, CHARLES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,250.00 FILED BY PAGE, PATRICIA L. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CHARLES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $298.16 FILED BY JOHNSON, CHARLES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PAGE, PATRICIA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST "DENIED WITHOUT PREJU- DICE. DEFT MAY SUBMIT AN AMENDED REQUEST SHOWING CAUSE FOR CONTINUANCE & LENGTH OF PROPOSED CONTC"
COPIES OF DENIAL MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
DEFENDENT FILED AMENDED REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. (FEE WAIVED AS PER COURT INSTRUCTION) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
PARTIES NOTIFIED BY PHONE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE RE TRIAL CONTINUANCE BY COURT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-27-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CLERK TO NOTIFY PARTIES ASAP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGE, PATRICIA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CHARLES $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE OF TRIAL, AND APPEARS PERSONALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHNSON, CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PAGE, PATRICIA L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
